title: Mechanical Cobblemons
description: This modpack aims to integrate Cobblemons and create, adding new recipes and ways of crafting more complex Cobblemon recipes using Create ways
body:
### Play with Pokémon, build with Create!

This modpack aims to integrate these 2 amazing mods into a single modpack, with custom mechanics and recipes to complement them.

### Main mods:

*   [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) - Adds the Pokémon to your Minecraft.
*   [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) - Animate your world using the signature machinerie of Create.
*   [Radical Cobblemon Trainers](https://modrinth.com/mod/rctmod) - Adds Pokémon trainers with leveling restrictions
*   [Sophisticated Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) - Adds backpacks to solve the inventory clutter
*   [Camerapture](https://modrinth.com/mod/camerapture) - Make beautiful photos of Pokémon and your builds to hang in galleries for others to see
*   [Better Days](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterdays) - Longer days and nights
*   [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs) - Gives modpack makers the ability to add/modify recipes and smaller interactions
*   [InControl!](https://modrinth.com/mod/in-control) - Ability to control mob spawn rate in world
*   [Looter](https://modrinth.com/mod/looter) - Gives everyone their own loot (including archaeology)
*   [Mechanical Healing Machine](https://modrinth.com/mod/mechanical-healing-machine) - Replaces the mechanic of the healing machine with new requirements, making potions a much more interesting option
*   [SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon) - Adds TM and TR for Pokémon to learn moves from

### Supporting mods:

*   [Advanced Loot Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/advanced-loot-info) - EMI plugin for loot table information. 
*   [AI Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/ai-improvements) - Performance improvements for AI. 
*   [Ambient Environment](https://modrinth.com/mod/ambient-environment) - Adds color noise to biome colors. 
*   [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food value information in tooltips. 
*   [Bad Wither No Cookie - Reloaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/bad-wither-no-cookie) - Localizes loud broadcast sounds. 
*   [Better Advancements](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-advancements) - Enlarges the advancement page. 
*   [Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) - Groups EXP orbs together. 
*   [CobbleFurnies](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblefurnies) - Pokémon themed furnaces. 
*   [Cobblemon Integrations](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-integrations) - Mod integrations for Cobblemon. 
*   [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Connected textures support. 
*   [Create: Copycats+](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats) - Create mod addon for camouflage blocks. 
*   [Create: Oxidized](https://modrinth.com/mod/copycats) - Copper oxidation for Create mod. 
*   [Default Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/default-options) - Keybind and options management. 
*   [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - Context-sensitive crosshair. 
*   [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Performance when the game is in the background. 
*   [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - Item and recipe viewer. 
*   [EMI Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi-enchanting) - EMI plugin for enchantments. 
*   [EMI Ores](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi-ores) - EMI plugin for ore generation. 
*   [EMI Professions (EMIP)](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi-professions-(emip) - EMI plugin for villager professions. 
*   [Enable trial spawners](https://modrinth.com/mod/enable-trial-spawners) - Makes trial spawners behave the same way as spawners do, allowing for spawner-only mobs. 
*   [Enhanced Attack Indicator](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-attack-indicator) - Better attack visual cues. 
*   [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Rendering optimization. 
*   [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Visual leaf particles. 
*   [Highlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlight) - Block highlighting tool. 
*   [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - UI and immediate rendering optimisation. 
*   [Inventory Profiles Next](https://modrinth.com/mod/inventory-profiles-next) - Inventory sorting and management. 
*   [InvMove](https://modrinth.com/mod/invmove) - Move while in inventory screens. 
*   [Item Highlighter](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-highlighter) - Highlights new items in inventory. 
*   [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) - Shows what id beeing looked at 
*   [Jade Addons](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade-addons-forge) - Shows what id beeing looked at 
*   [Just Enough Breeding (JEBr)](https://modrinth.com/mod/justenoughbreeding) - Breeding info for JEI/EMI. 
*   [Just Enought Effect Descriptions (JEED)](https://modrinth.com/mod/just-enough-effect-descriptions-jeed) - Plugin that provides useful information regarding status effects 
*   [Just Enought Items (JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - Enables EMI to see more recepies
*   [KryptonFoxified](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton-foxified) - Network stack optimization. 
*   [KubeJS Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs-create) - Gives the ability to modify recipes/interactions for Create. 
*   [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Dynamic hand-held lights. 
*   [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Server-side game logic optimization. 
*   [Longer Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/longer-chat-history) - Increases chat buffer. 
*   [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in block models. 
*   [Monsters in the Closet](https://modrinth.com/mod/monsters-in-the-closet) - Shows mobs preventing sleep. 
*   [NetherPortalFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/netherportalfix) - Fixes nether portal linking. 
*   [Not Enough Animations](https://modrinth.com/mod/not-enough-animations) - More 3rd person animations. 
*   [Particle Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/particle-rain) - Rain as particles for performance. 
*   [Particular](https://modrinth.com/mod/particular) - Visual particle enhancements. 
*   [Ping Wheel](https://modrinth.com/mod/ping-wheel) - Location pinging system. 
*   [Pokemon Field Lab](https://modrinth.com/mod/pokemon-field-lab) - Field research station for Cobblemon. 
*   [Pokemon Fair Catch](https://modrinth.com/mod/pokemon-fair-catch) - Fairer catch mechanics for Cobblemon. 
*   [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Better Sodium menu. 
*   [ShulkerBoxTooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Preview shulker box contents. 
*   [Sodium Extra/Extras](undefined) - Additional Sodium features. 
*   [Sodium (and submods)](undefined) - Very many rendering optimization. 
*   [Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks ](undefined) - Fixes sodium rendering of almost full blocks 
*   [Sophisticated Backpacks Create](undefined) - Create integration for backpacks. 
*   [SwingThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/swingthrough) - Hit through grass/flowers. 
*   [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - Visual impact particles. 
*   [Wakes Reforged](undefined) - Water wake effects. 
*   [Xaero's Map/Minimap](undefined) - Full world map and minimap.

### Dependencies:

*   [Balm](https://modrinth.com/mod/balm) - Required by Crafting Tweaks and NetherPortalFix.
*   [Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) - Required by Enchantment Descriptions.
*   [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Required by many mods to use their in-game config menus.
*   [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Required by all Fabric mods.
*   [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Required by all shader packs.
*   [Konkrete](https://modrinth.com/mod/konkrete) - Required by FancyMenu.
*   [Melody](https://modrinth.com/mod/melody) - Required by FancyMenu.
*   [Prickle](https://modrinth.com/mod/prickle) - Required by Enchantment Descriptions.
*   [UniLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/unilib) - Required by CraftPresence.
*   [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - Required by Satin Free Wakes.
*   [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) - Intermediate API for mods.


### Resourcepacks:

*   [Motschen's Better Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-leaves) - Resource pack to make leaves look bushier.
*   [E19 - Cobblemon Minimap Icons](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/e19_cobblemon_minimap_icons) - Cobblemon icons for Minimap.

### Shaderpacks:

*   [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) - Recommended shader pack.
